name: Femtanyl
description: '''Femtanyl''' (stylized in all lowercase) are a Canadian [[electronic music]] duo based in [[Toronto]] consisting of founding member and lead singer '''Noelle Stockwood'''{{efn|Formerly '''Noelle Mansbridge'''.<ref name=":1"/>}} and multi-instrumentalist '''Juno Callender'''. Their music is popular in online spaces, particularly among the [[furry fandom]]. They take inspiration from a wide variety of sources including groups like [[Nine Inch Nails]], [[Throbbing Gristle]], [[the Prodigy]], and [[Drain Gang]], as well as modern [[electronic dance music]] and [[pop music]].
